section.heading: Definitions
section.chapeau: In this subchapter, the following definitions apply:

paragraph.heading: Carrier, lessor.—
paragraph.content: The terms “carrier” and “lessor” include a receiver or trustee of a pipeline carrier and lessor, respectively.

paragraph.heading: Lessor.—
paragraph.content: The term “lessor” means a person owning a pipeline that is leased to and operated by a carrier providing transportation under this part.

paragraph.heading: Association.—
paragraph.content: The term “association” means an organization maintained by or in the interest of a group of pipeline carriers that performs a service, or engages in activities, related to transportation under this part.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 11141 of this title prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by Pub. L. 104–88, § 102(a).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Jan. 1, 1996, except as otherwise provided in Pub. L. 104–88, see section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88, set out as a note under section 1301 of this title.
